title: El pecado de ser mujer
writer: Rafael García Travesi, Tito Guízar, Zacarías Gómez Urquiza
actors: Tito Guízar, Alma Rosa Aguirre, Ricardo Román
plot: Javier Morales is a singer-songwriter who seduces Maria Luisa, a young woman who he gets pregnant and then abandons. Twenty years later, Javier falls into poverty, along with a recurrent alcohol consumption problem. After he's mis...
